name: Cranberry Applesauce Bread
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------------CRANAPPLESAUCE-------------------------------
1 and 1/4 cups Cranberries
1/2 teaspoon Grated zest of lemon
4 Golden delicious apples (peeled and diced, 1/2 inch)
1/2 cup Sugar +
1 teaspoon Ginger root
2 tablespoons Water
1/4 teaspoon Cinnamon
Put all in machine sweet bread cycle if you have it.
Cranapple Sauce: Place water and sugar in a large heavy saucepan over high heat. Cook stirring until sugar is dissolved. Add apples, cover and stir frequently for 5 minutes. Then add cranberries, cook for 15 to 20 minutes until cranberries pop and apples are soft. Mash with potato masher (will still be slightly lumpy). Add spices and zest, cook another 5 minutes for flavors to blend. Cool before using.
Peel and dice the apples first. The sauce will keep in the fridge for 3 days and can also be served warm with dinner.
